pending.body: `src/adapters/worktree.rs:142-152` narrows tracked ignored-path detection to `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-per-directory=.gitignore`, and `build_checkpoint_tree` only removes the paths returned by that scan (`src/adapters/worktree.rs:269-274`). That means tracked files ignored via other standard Git ignore sources, notably `.git/info/exclude` and `core.excludesFile`, still survive into checkpoint commits. The new tests at `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs:437-533` explicitly lock in that narrower behavior. The bead requires the standard-ignore behavior (`--exclude-standard` or equivalent), so this leaves `rb: checkpoint` incomplete and still able to leak unrelated locally ignored tracked files into diffs.
